Terms of Service

Terms of Service

Last updated: February 12, 2024

Welcome to Haggle! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Haggle website, mobile applications, and services (collectively, the "Services"), so please read them carefully before using the Services.

By accessing or using the Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, do not access or use the Services.

User Eligibility

  1. You must be at least 18 years old and a member of the [Your Campus] community to use our Services. By using our Services, you represent and warrant that you meet these eligibility requirements.

Your Account

  1. When you create an account with us, you must provide accurate and complete information. You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
  2. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account or any other breach of security. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time and for any reason, without prior notice.

User Conduct

  1. You agree to use the Services in compliance with all applicable laws, regulations, and these Terms.
  2. You will not use the Services to engage in any unlawful, harmful, or fraudulent activities, including but not limited to spamming, phishing, or distributing malicious software.
  3. You will not use the Services to harass, intimidate, or threaten other users, or to engage in any form of hate speech, discrimination, or violence.

Listings and Transactions

  1. Haggle provides a platform for users to buy, sell, and exchange goods and services. We do not own or control the items listed on the platform, nor do we guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of any transactions.
  2. You are solely responsible for the accuracy and legality of the listings you create, including any descriptions, images, and pricing information.
  3. All transactions conducted through the Services are solely between the buyer and the seller. Haggle is not a party to any transaction and will not be liable for any disputes arising from or related to such transactions.

Content Ownership

  1. You retain ownership of any content you create or upload to the Services, including but not limited to listings, comments, and messages.
  2. By using the Services, you grant Haggle a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, translate, distribute, and display your content for the purpose of operating and promoting the Services.

Intellectual Property Rights

  1. The Haggle name, logo, and all related trademarks, service marks, and logos are the exclusive property of Haggle. You agree not to use or display these trademarks without our prior written permission.
  2. All other trademarks, service marks, and logos displayed on the Services are the property of their respective owners.

Limitation of Liability

  1. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Haggle and its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents, and licensors will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of the Services.

Termination

  1. We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your access to the Services at any time and for any reason, without prior notice.

Changes to Terms

  1. We may modify these Terms at any time by posting the revised Terms on the Services. Your continued use of the Services after the effective date of the revised Terms constitutes your acceptance of the changes.

Governing Law

  1. These Terms are governed by and construed per the laws of the state of California and U.S Federal Law. Any disputes arising out of or related to these Terms will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in the United States of America.

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at [Contact Information].
